citation.description: `if blocking: verdict = 'BLOCK'` checked first, before `elif coverage.get('prerequisite_indeterminate')`, implementing the required precedence. Verified by test at tests/unit/test_plan_review_prerequisites_heldout.py:176-184.

criteria.criterion: With coverage['prerequisite_indeterminate'] True AND a blocking finding present, verdict == 'BLOCK'.

citation.description: test_prerequisite_indeterminate_without_blocker_is_indeterminate asserts verdict == 'INDETERMINATE' when no blocking finding present; orchestrator.py:533 implements this case.

criteria.criterion: With prerequisite_indeterminate True and NO blocking finding, verdict == 'INDETERMINATE' (unchanged).

citation.description: After `elif coverage.get('prerequisite_indeterminate')`, the chain continues: `elif coverage.get('llm_unavailable')` -> `elif coverage.get('hierarchy_incomplete')` -> `elif coverage.get('verify_failed')` -> else PASS. Precedence among these is unchanged.

criteria.criterion: Existing llm_unavailable / hierarchy_incomplete / verify_failed precedence unchanged.
